title: Cobblemon Pride Wallpapers
description: Adds 8 pride flag wallpapers so you can celebrate your identity in your Cobblemon PC!
body:
Adds 8 pride flags to your Cobblemon PC wallpaper list!

Hold shift while selecting a wallpaper for alternate darker versions (this helps contrast better with the pokemon in your box if you're having trouble seeing them)

These work fully client side, once you enable the resource pack, restart your game or relog the current world/server to apply them!

This resource pack comes bundled within my other project: [Chiselmon - Cobblemon QOL](https://modrinth.com/mod/chiselmon)
